_note: Official UNC 2025 football media guide. Honors sections: All-America Honors (94-95), First-Team All-America Selections (96-99), National Awards (100), All-Conference Selections (104-106, per-year with team level + conference awards). honors-pages.txt is pdftotext of pp.94-110. Covers through the 2024 season; 2025-season honors need a separate source.
